Hey you guys, just a quick video on how an end user can cancel a subscription. So you will log in to the distributor.pressedeaselabs.com site. I'm logged in to the testing site for demonstration purposes. That's why it looks a little different here on the left-hand panel. But yours will have all your normal menu for the distributors, etc. on the left-hand side. But so you log in to the distributor.pressedeaselabs.com site. That'll take you to your dashboard. When you get to your dashboard, click on the subscriptions tab over here on the left-hand side. When you click on that, it's going to take you to your list of subscriptions if you have more than one. And you can see which subscriptions are canceled, etc. So we're going to click on this one right here that says it's active so we can view the details on it. Click on view. As you can see, we can see the start date, the last order date, the next payment date. We've also got a variety of different information here and they can also manage their subscription here. Change payment, cancel, change address, add an item to their subscription, see related orders, billing, shipping address, shipping information, all that good stuff. But for the purpose of this video, we're showing how to cancel a subscription. So they would click on subscription as we've just done. They would go to view to view that subscription. And once on this screen, you can see right here we have actions. On this actions area right here, click on cancel. And when they click on cancel, that's going to take them to this page. The first step in the funnel that's going to ask if they'd like to change any products that they're receiving, as far as flavor, adding an item, subtracting an item. You can do that by clicking on the relative button below so you can click on change product. But we're going to, for the purpose of this, we're going to click on continue to cancel. That'll take us to the second funnel where it will say, do you want to change your shipping address, push out your next delivery date, change your billing information. You can do all that and handle that below. And we can help you by clicking on the corresponding buttons below. Update shipping address, change payment date, update payment information. And that'll take you to the correlating section to update that information. For this video, we're going to go ahead and click on continue to cancel. Once we do that, that's going to take us to our, are you sure you want to cancel? We're sorry to see you go. Take a minute and let us know why you're canceling. Choose one of the various options here. Various options here. Didn't use them, didn't enjoy the flavors. Do not plan on exercising anymore. Received the wrong order. Shipping was delayed, et cetera. Or you can click on the other box here and put in your custom description. At that point, you click on cancel subscription. And that will cancel your subscription. Actually, it'll put it into a pending cancellation status right here. And at that point, it'll be canceled. I didn't hit cancel on that last part just so it, so I can actually redo this video again if I need to, but that is the process for how you cancel a subscription.
